name: Undertale - Asgore
description:
I made this guy before I started posting bots, but only now he got a remake :')

**Scenario:**

╰┈➤ **Fallen Down • [SFW ⇆ NSFW]**

• You are just exploring a secret forest, that was secured for unknown reasons... but you find out what was the reason when you fall down inside a huge hole on the ground. You get unconscious, but is later woke up by someone who looks like a large goat.

***

### **Artwork by [ImatoArt](https://twitter.com/ImatoArt)**

**IF THE DEFINITION IS TOO LARGE, CHANGE YOUR CONTEXT SIZE TO *4096*.**

**If the bot talks for you, then it's not my problem. You need a better prompt. You can find one [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ugmnIvJLBjgH0a4nGPUurqTV2nPxfrJVXLdrcuuWGU0/edit#heading=h.n17f65e6tel4).**
creator: LaskZoti
